title: 稳定重叠归档的 ownership 选择规则

sources.reason: Archive pair ranking and effective owner selection implementation.
Existing overlapping archive owner regression tests.

riskAssessment.reason: The change makes the existing rank policy effective without changing path scope or restore semantics.

executionDecision.reason: Implement deterministic archive owner selection and verify overlapping claims.

preReviewWarnings: Owner selection must be determined by archive rank, not incidental input order.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Overlapping archive owners are sorted by archive_pair_rank before effective owner selection.
Tests prove rank wins regardless of archive input order and restricted approval follows the ranked owner.
Existing no-op restore behavior remains unchanged.
Full AI and project quality checks pass.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: The PR checker computes archive_pair_rank but selects owners using owners[-1], allowing input order to override the documented latest archive rule.
constraints: Do not change no-op restore semantics.
Do not edit existing archive evidence.
intent.rationale: A deterministic rank must be applied at the point of effective owner selection so overlapping claims remain reviewable and stable.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: A higher-ranked archive owner wins when input order is reversed.
Restricted approval is evaluated against the ranked effective owner.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: Set only when a human explicitly approves restricted governance paths.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
